; Ferrari DocumentView extension. Stock toolbar, pen handling, close, and swipes stay intact.
; Ferrari DocumentView.qml SHA-256: a2102689b1feb4604e98ece588ee4606a64a7b0599bda2a3e8fac431f0fa74a5
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE FocusScope > Item#_uiContainer
        LOCATE BEFORE Toolbar#toolbar
        INSERT {
            Item {
                id: lettersHomeLayer
                objectName: "letters-home-native-layer"
                anchors.fill: parent
                clip: true
                visible: isLettersHome

                readonly property bool isLettersHome: root.document
                    && root.document.visibleName.indexOf("Letters Home ") === 0
                readonly property string sessionKey: isLettersHome
                    ? root.document.visibleName.substring("Letters Home ".length) : ""
                property int version: -1
                property var sessionState: ({})
                readonly property string phase: sessionState.phase || ""
                readonly property string incomingPageId: sessionState.page_ids?.incoming || ""
                readonly property string replyPageId: sessionState.page_ids?.reply || ""
                readonly property string markedPageId: sessionState.page_ids?.marked || pendingMarkedPageId
                readonly property string responsePageId: sessionState.page_ids?.response || pendingResponsePageId
                readonly property var incomingGlyphs: sessionState.incoming
                    && sessionState.incoming.glyphs ? sessionState.incoming.glyphs : []
                readonly property var responseGlyphs: sessionState.response
                    && sessionState.response.glyphs ? sessionState.response.glyphs : []
                readonly property var reviewCorrections: sessionState.review?.corrections || []
                readonly property var reviewAnnotations: sessionState.review?.annotations || []

                property bool inkPosted: false
                property bool submitting: false
                property bool awaitingCopy: false
                property string pendingMarkedPageId: ""
                property string pendingResponsePageId: ""
                property string guardPageId: ""
                property bool guardActive: false
                property bool participantNavigated: false
                property bool reviewNotified: false

                onSessionKeyChanged: {
                    version = -1;
                    sessionState = ({});
                    inkPosted = false;
                    submitting = false;
                    awaitingCopy = false;
                    pendingMarkedPageId = "";
                    pendingResponsePageId = "";
                    guardPageId = "";
                    guardActive = false;
                    participantNavigated = false;
                    reviewNotified = false;
                }

                function notify(message) {
                    root.notificationQueue.enqueue({
                        text: message,
                        timeout: 5000
                    });
                }

                function poll() {
                    if (!isLettersHome || !sessionKey) {
                        return;
                    }
                    const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
                    request.open("GET", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/sessions/" + sessionKey);
                    request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (request.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE || request.status !== 200) {
                            return;
                        }
                        const response = JSON.parse(request.responseText);
                        if (response.version !== lettersHomeLayer.version) {
                            lettersHomeLayer.version = response.version;
                            lettersHomeLayer.sessionState = response;
                        }
                        if (!lettersHomeLayer.reviewNotified && response.review
                                && response.review.summary) {
                            lettersHomeLayer.reviewNotified = true;
                            lettersHomeLayer.notify("A reply has arrived");
                        }
                        const responseStarted = response.response
                            && response.response.glyphs
                            && response.response.glyphs.length > 0
                            && (response.phase === "response-streaming"
                                || response.phase === "complete");
                        if (responseStarted
                                && lettersHomeLayer.guardActive
                                && !lettersHomeLayer.participantNavigated
                                && root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.guardPageId) {
                            lettersHomeLayer.guardActive = false;
                            root.openPage(3, DocumentView.ScrollPosition.SaveAndRestore);
                        }
                    };
                    request.send();
                }

                function postFirstInk() {
                    const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
                    request.open("POST", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/sessions/ink-start");
                    request.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
                    request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (request.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE && request.status !== 200) {
                            console.warn("[LettersHome] first ink marker failed", request.status);
                            lettersHomeLayer.inkPosted = false;
                        }
                    };
                    request.send(JSON.stringify({
                        session_id: sessionKey,
                        document_id: root.document.id,
                        reply_page_id: replyPageId,
                        observed_at: Date.now() / 1000
                    }));
                }

                function submit() {
                    if (submitting || root.currentPageId !== replyPageId) {
                        return;
                    }
                    submitting = true;
                    if (pendingMarkedPageId && pendingResponsePageId) {
                        postSubmission();
                        return;
                    }
                    awaitingCopy = true;
                    DocumentController.copyPages(root.document.id, [1], root.document.id, 2);
                }

                function addResponsePage() {
                    DocumentController.addPageWithTemplateAndPageSize(
                        root.document.id,
                        3,
                        "letters-home-ferrari",
                        Qt.size(954, 1696),
                        function() {
                            pendingMarkedPageId = root.document.idForPage(2);
                            pendingResponsePageId = root.document.idForPage(3);
                            if (!pendingMarkedPageId || !pendingResponsePageId) {
                                submitting = false;
                                notify("Reply not sent. Your ink is safe; try again.");
                                return;
                            }
                            postSubmission();
                        }
                    );
                }

                function postSubmission() {
                    guardPageId = pendingMarkedPageId;
                    participantNavigated = false;
                    guardActive = true;
                    root.openPage(2, DocumentView.ScrollPosition.SaveAndRestore);
                    const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
                    request.open("POST", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/sessions/submit");
                    request.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
                    request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (request.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLayer.submitting = false;
                        if (request.status === 200) {
                            lettersHomeLayer.notify("Your letter is being reviewed");
                            lettersHomeLayer.poll();
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLayer.guardActive = false;
                        console.warn("[LettersHome] submit failed", request.status);
                        lettersHomeLayer.notify("Reply not sent. Your ink is safe; try again.");
                    };
                    request.send(JSON.stringify({
                        session_id: sessionKey,
                        document_id: root.document.id,
                        reply_page_id: replyPageId,
                        reply_page_index: 1,
                        marked_page_id: pendingMarkedPageId,
                        response_page_id: pendingResponsePageId,
                        profile_id: "ferrari_3.28.0.162",
                        conversation_context: ""
                    }));
                }

                Timer {
                    interval: 750
                    repeat: true
                    triggeredOnStart: true
                    running: lettersHomeLayer.isLettersHome
                    onTriggered: lettersHomeLayer.poll()
                }

                Connections {
                    target: root.penHandler
                    enabled: lettersHomeLayer.isLettersHome && !lettersHomeLayer.inkPosted
                    function onStrokeCompleted() {
                        if (root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.replyPageId) {
                            lettersHomeLayer.inkPosted = true;
                            lettersHomeLayer.postFirstInk();
                        }
                    }
                }

                Connections {
                    target: root.document
                    function onPagesAdded(pageIndexes) {
                        if (!lettersHomeLayer.awaitingCopy) {
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLayer.awaitingCopy = false;
                        if (!root.document || root.document.pageCount < 3) {
                            lettersHomeLayer.submitting = false;
                            lettersHomeLayer.notify("Reply not sent. Your ink is safe; try again.");
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLayer.addResponsePage();
                    }
                }

                Connections {
                    target: root
                    function onCurrentPageChanged() {
                        if (lettersHomeLayer.guardActive
                                && root.currentPageId !== lettersHomeLayer.guardPageId) {
                            lettersHomeLayer.participantNavigated = true;
                        }
                    }
                }

                Repeater {
                    model: root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.incomingPageId
                        ? lettersHomeLayer.incomingGlyphs : []
                    Text {
                        x: modelData.x * lettersHomeLayer.width / 954 - width / 2
                        y: modelData.y * lettersHomeLayer.height / 1696 - height / 2
                        text: modelData.glyph
                        color: "#263d52"
                        font.pixelSize: 34
                        antialiasing: false
                    }
                }

                Text {
                    visible: root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.incomingPageId
                    x: 72
                    y: lettersHomeLayer.height - 52
                    text: "A fictional letter generated for this encounter"
                    color: "#786f63"
                    font.pixelSize: 16
                    antialiasing: false
                }

                Repeater {
                    model: root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.responsePageId
                        ? lettersHomeLayer.responseGlyphs : []
                    Text {
                        x: modelData.x * lettersHomeLayer.width / 954 - width / 2
                        y: modelData.y * lettersHomeLayer.height / 1696 - height / 2
                        text: modelData.glyph
                        color: "#263d52"
                        font.pixelSize: 34
                        antialiasing: false
                    }
                }

                Repeater {
                    model: root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.markedPageId
                        ? lettersHomeLayer.reviewCorrections : []
                    Item {
                        x: modelData.anchor.x * lettersHomeLayer.width
                        y: modelData.anchor.y * lettersHomeLayer.height
                        width: modelData.anchor.width * lettersHomeLayer.width
                        height: modelData.anchor.height * lettersHomeLayer.height
                        Rectangle {
                            anchors.fill: parent
                            radius: Math.max(width, height) / 2
                            color: "transparent"
                            border.color: "#b52222"
                            border.width: 3
                        }
                        Text {
                            anchors.left: parent.right
                            anchors.leftMargin: 8
                            anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
                            text: modelData.suggested_text
                            color: "#b52222"
                            font.pixelSize: 30
                            font.bold: true
                        }
                    }
                }

                Repeater {
                    model: root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.markedPageId
                        ? lettersHomeLayer.reviewAnnotations : []
                    Rectangle {
                        x: modelData.anchor.x * lettersHomeLayer.width
                        y: modelData.anchor.y * lettersHomeLayer.height
                        width: modelData.anchor.width * lettersHomeLayer.width
                        height: modelData.anchor.height * lettersHomeLayer.height
                        radius: Math.max(width, height) / 2
                        color: "transparent"
                        border.color: "#756c62"
                        border.width: 2
                    }
                }

                Rectangle {
                    id: lettersHomeReviewNote
                    visible: root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.markedPageId
                        && !!lettersHomeLayer.sessionState.review?.summary
                    x: 40
                    y: lettersHomeLayer.height - height - 70
                    width: Math.min(lettersHomeLayer.width * 0.58, 520)
                    height: reviewNoteColumn.implicitHeight + 28
                    color: "#f8f1e3"
                    opacity: 0.94
                    border.color: "#b52222"
                    border.width: 1
                    radius: 8

                    Column {
                        id: reviewNoteColumn
                        x: 14
                        y: 14
                        width: parent.width - 28
                        spacing: 8
                        Text {
                            width: parent.width
                            text: lettersHomeLayer.sessionState.review?.summary || ""
                            wrapMode: Text.Wrap
                            color: "#4b4035"
                            font.pixelSize: 22
                        }
                        Text {
                            width: parent.width
                            text: lettersHomeLayer.sessionState.review?.reflective_question || ""
                            wrapMode: Text.Wrap
                            color: "#6a2b2b"
                            font.pixelSize: 20
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        LOCATE AFTER Toolbar#toolbar
        INSERT {
            ArkControls.Button {
                id: lettersHomeSubmit
                objectName: "letters-home-submit"
                text: lettersHomeLayer.submitting ? "寄送中…" : "寄出"
                visible: lettersHomeLayer.isLettersHome
                    && root.currentPageId === lettersHomeLayer.replyPageId
                    && !lettersHomeLayer.sessionState.submitted_at
                enabled: visible && !lettersHomeLayer.submitting
                    && lettersHomeLayer.phase === "ready"
                width: 124
                height: 56
                anchors.right: parent.right
                anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
                anchors.rightMargin: toolbar.position === ToolbarPositioner.Position.Right
                    && toolbar.shown ? toolbar.innerWidth + 42 : 42
                anchors.bottomMargin: toolbar.position === ToolbarPositioner.Position.Bottom
                    && toolbar.shown ? toolbar.innerHeight + 54 : 54
                onClicked: lettersHomeLayer.submit()
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
